name: Run Local JavaScript Action

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  demo-javascript-action:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4 # because we use JavaScript action from the same repository, we need to checkout the code first. If we use JavaScript action from another repository, we don't need to checkout the code.

      - name: Use remote action with ref style
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4 # remote action example in owner/repo@ref format
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Run local JavaScript action
        id: js_action
        uses: ./.github/workflows/any_javascript # local action from same repository uses a relative path to action.yml; remote examples: actions/checkout@v4 (owner=actions, repo=checkout) and my-org/ci-actions/setup-env@v2 (owner=my-org, repo=ci-actions)
        env: # pass
          NODE_OPTIONS: --experimental-fetch # because we use fetch API in our JavaScript action, we need to enable experimental fetch API in Node.js
        with:
          any_name_var: GitHub Actions

      - name: Show action output
        run: echo "Action returned time ='${{ steps.js_action.outputs.any_time_var }}'" # to access output of JavaScript action we need to use steps.<step_id>.outputs.<output_name> syntax.
